title: Lygeum tenax
taxonomy: Lygeum tenax is classified as a plant species in the family Restionaceae, which is a family of monocotyledonous flowering plants. It belongs to the order Poales and is native to Europe and North Africa. The species is also known as the spike-rush. Lygeum tenax is a perennial plant that grows in wet environments such as marshes and fens. It is a relatively rare plant species in its native range.
